sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n112063" key="fono/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">φονόω</orth>, <sense id="n112063.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">stain with blood,</tr_> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">πεφονωμένον ἔγχος</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0024.tlg001.perseus-grc1:4:192" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Opp.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">C.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">4.192</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
